name: Soul Brothers' Greens
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the turnip and mustard greens.
2. Combine the greens with the chopped onion in a saucepan.
3. Add olive or vegetable oil to the saucepan.
4. Cook over medium heat until the greens are tender.
5. Season to taste with cayenne pepper and salt.
Per Serving: 75 calories, 4g protein, 11g carbohydrate, 3g fat (0g saturated), 0mg cholesterol, 66mg sodium, 5g fiber.
